title: MA.TO Quality
description: Just a vanilla modpack with quality of life mods
body:
🧭 MA.TO Quality — v1.0

Minecraft Version: 1.21.4
Type: Vanilla+ / Quality of Life / Performance

🪓 Description

Welcome to MA.TO Quality, the first release of a Vanilla+ modpack designed to enhance the original Minecraft experience without changing its soul.
This pack gathers a selection of lightweight, performance-friendly mods that improve visuals, comfort, and utility — while keeping the pure survival gameplay you love.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚙️ Main Features & Mods

🧭 Xaero’s World Map & Minimap — smooth and detailed navigation.

📦 Chest Tracker & Inventory Profiles Next — smart inventory organization and item search.

🍗 AppleSkin & Roughly Enough Items (REI) — better food and recipe info display.

💨 Sodium, Entity Culling & Dynamic FPS — strong performance boost and stable framerate.

🧱 Continuity & Entity Texture Features — connected textures and enhanced visuals.

🔧 BetterF3 & Mod Menu — cleaner interface and easier mod management.

🧍 3D Skin Layers & Simple Elytra HUD — subtle cosmetic improvements that add life to the game.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🌿 Philosophy :

MA.TO Quality aims to deliver a modernized Vanilla experience — smooth, elegant, and comfortable — for players who want to enjoy Minecraft as it is, just with more polish and less frustration.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🧪 Status :

🧩 Version 1.0 — First public release
This version focuses on Quality of Life and performance optimization.
Future updates will refine compatibility, stability, and light immersive touches.
